Package com.mentor.chs.api.report

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IXAttributeComparator
    Attribute comparator in addition to being an object comparator allows for specifying the attributes that need not be considered for change.
    IXAutoViewDiagramGenerator  
    IXAutoViewDiagramProcessor  
    IXChangeDescription
    Allows user to store the information about a change as key value pairs.
    IXChangedObject
    Each change recognized by the comparators are created as a changed object.
    IXChangeType
    Lets user to specify the color code of the change and type of the change.
    IXComparisonBuilder
    Extracts all changes between the current and the reference design.
    IXDesignComparisonContext
    Design Compariosn context allows
    1) Registration of user defined comparators and matchers
    2)Definition of the colors to be used in diagram ouputs, for example in SVG diagrams to represent a change
    3)Procure the design comparison factory, which in turn can be used for creation of some default implementations and the objects meant for holding the change, like IXChangedObject, IXChangeType and IXChangeDescription.
    IXDesignComparisonFactory
    Design Comparison factory is used for creation of the default svg builder, comparison builder, attribute comparator, properties comparator, connectivity comparator and object matcher.
    IXEmbeddableReport  
    IXFunctionDesignReport
    If you need to create a custom report generation that works on function designs, you need to implement this interface.
    IXHarnessReport
    If you need to implement a Custom report generation that works on HarnessXC designs, you need to implement this interface.
    IXHarnessTVMReport
    If you need to implement a Custom report generation that works on Harness TVM data, you need to implement this interface.
    IXIntegratorReport
    If you need to implement a Custom report generation that works on Integrator designs, you need to implement this interface.
    IXLogicReport
    If you need to implement a Custom report generation that works on Logic designs, you need to implement this interface.
    IXObjectComparator
    Object comparators allow to specify the objects that are to be considered for change and to build the changes, additions and deletions.
    IXObjectMatcher
    Object matcher indicates whether two objects (one from current and one from reference design) match each other in a comparison according to some criteria.
    IXPlatformReport
    If you need to implement a Custom report generation that works on Platform designs, you need to implement this interface.
    IXReport
    A report is defined by a collection of report modules( see IXReportModule).
    IXReportContext  
    IXReportCreator
    This interface needs to be implemented for generating the custom report.
    IXReportFactory
    report factory is used to create a report and its allied objects (modules/templates) see IXReport,IXReportModule and IXReportTemplate.
    IXReportModule
    A report module clubs together collection of queries and result expressions.
    IXReportTemplate
    A report template has a resultexpression which is a formula that decides the content(string) to be shown for entity types queried for in a report module.
    IXSBOMReport
    If you need to implement a Custom report generation that works on SBOMs, you need to implement this interface.
    IXSVGBuilder
    Outputs the svg of the diagram after annotating the SVG with the colour indicated for change on the objects that have a change with respect to the comparators registered.
    IXTopologyReport
    If you need to implement a Custom report generation that works on Topology designs, you need to implement this interface.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    IXAutoViewDiagramGenerator.XDiagramGenerationOptions  
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    IXAutoViewDiagramGenerator.XDiagramGenerationOptions.XTemplateDesignSelectionMethod
    Autoview diagram generator can choose a reference design in template project automatically based on the option provided in the enum XTemplateDesignSelectionMethod.
